reviews.review_description:
I used to play Zooma on my computer - long before the days of social media. I have loved this game in VR, and played through the whole game, and now going back to get 3 stars on all the levels where I didn't reach that on the first go-through. But, recently, for the past few months, it randomly crashes during game play. Very frustrating. Will just close without warning with a pop-up box saying "Zooma app has closed". Sometimes it'll happen shortly after starting, sometimes after 20-30 minutes of playing. Sometimes 2 or 3 times during a single gaming session, requiring to reload the app and start the level all over again.

What's up with that? Please fix it. Makes it very frustrating when doing really well on a level and then have to start over.

One other game-play issue I'm having. On some levels where the balls change color as they go through the rings, sometimes the ball that I shoot will change color between shooting it and landing in the grouping. I don't mean hitting the line just before it goes through a color-change ring. I mean well away from that ring (or at least on the 'after' side). I'll shoot a red ball and will watch it change color to blue or green or whatever, as it lands in place such that what would have been a match to remove those balls, suddenly is just adding a ball to the line, which undermines the clearing of the balls.

Also, would love to see DLCs of new chapters, each with 30 levels of game play (as each chapter in the original game), so we can keep the game going. Or a sequel game with 4 new chapters, each with 30 levels. 

Please fix the random crash issue. Please add DLCs or a sequel game. Thank you!
Such a shame as was working perfectly and was enjoying it. Now crashes half way through a level making it impossible to play. Have uninstall and reinstalled,  made no difference. VR is fully updated.

Yes I have restarted and have the latest updates. This Game crashes not just for me but for other users that I know that also play.

Will update this review when/if this game works again.

If you liked Zuma you will love this in VR.
 well worth the price.
Very well made game ..

Great game - it's fun and I keep jumping back in for 1-3 rounds.

The only question that remains for me is: How can you reach 270 stars per chapter? I count 30 levels per chapter, which would be 90 stars per chapter.

I really like the game, I do. But every time I Exit the game my headset glitches and my Menu will not pop up. Actually, nothing will pop up regardless of what I click. I have to restart my headset every time. This is the only app that causes this issue.
Great game. I play this at night when I want to wind down. I’ve always loved playing zuma and this is it in VR.

Great game, honestly it is. Unfortunately I am colorblind and when Level 11 hits is when stuff gets tough, namely because I am seeing green balls but apparently there's another type of (assumingely also green) ball that I keep goofing on which makes it where I fail the level.

This is a great game for throwing on my Bluetooth headphones and listening to a podcast while I play. If I had one nitpick though... the guns look a little out of place in the environment. I'd have expected something less toy-like and more like a mini and held Pirate cannon. but that's only a minor detail and doesn't make this any less than a 5-star game.
This is a classic must have. Great to see it this way.

I don’t give 5 star reviews easily. However this game is a perfect VR representation of Zuma. I am blown away by how accurate of a version it is. There are even the usual power ups and you have to shoot them like normal. The only difference in nothing and everything. I love love love this faithfulness to the original version of this game. I wish all the best for this dev. 🤙🙏🔥

This was one of my preferred games on Rift. Some of puzzle and most of classic arcade. An incredibly well done game of match three balls in really immersive 3d. I'm so happy I can finally play it nativelly on my Quest. It's been ported to Quest with all its marvellous playability, gameplay is the  same as PC version. Little graphics downgrade, all the emotion and full addictive. Thanks devs for this absolutelly must have. Wish you can get to the official Quest store and waiting for future updates to keep on playing

I had this game previously for Rift and the port is brilliant (I do not miss anything). 

It improves the 2D experience by adding the depth dimension and an extra gun. 
Maybe an option with extra textures for the balls could be a good option for the future.

Note for the developer: When the tail is empty but still running (because there are balls in the line), I can not stick a ball in it (it pass through). I do not know if this is a bug (because in Luxor you can append a ball). May you check that? thanks

When I want to play a stage I liked in the past again, it is difficult to select the stage because I have to judge only from the numbers. I would be happy if I had the option to view a screenshot of the stage.

I love this game.  It is very zen and relaxing while being fun at the same time.

Any chance of getting multi-player?
This needed to exist, and now it does.

How this is game not on the main Oculus Store is beyond me.
This is already a AAA puzzle game that is addictive as they come.
Love this game. Very similar to zuma and zuma’s revenge which I loved playing on pc so if like me you loved these games you’ll love this

reviews.review_title: One of my favorite VR games
reviews.review_description: This game is awesome. The graphics are pretty good. It is also challenging without being frustrating. I would highly recommend for those who enjoy match 3 games.
